request.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for the closing thesis in a narrated CRE strategy video
Primary request: an architectural blueprint desk tableau with a physical building model, a brass key, reserve cash materials, and a strategic site map laid out with fortress-like discipline
Scene/background: dark strategy room, controlled desk lighting, calm confidence at the end of a long cycle
Subject: architectural model, blueprint rolls, brass key, reserve envelope, mapped site plan
Action: light slowly travels across the blueprint surface while dust motes drift through the beam
Camera: 45-degree orbit, 50mm, slow and precise
Lighting/mood: focused desk light, calm, strategic, resilient
Color palette: charcoal, muted teal, warm paper, brushed brass, soft coral
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, premium strategy tableau
Timing/beats: eight-second precise orbit with quiet motion
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable plan labels
Avoid: jitter; flicker; readable text; warped models; surreal movement
